privileged_info_summary: The replace_document_file task is located at /default-domain/workspaces/Templates/Contract-Template in a Nuxeo Platform environment. The task requires replacing the file attachment with /home/ga/nuxeo/data/Q3_Status_Report.pdf (6160 bytes) while preserving the document title 'Contract Template'. The verifier uses a 20% file size tolerance and verifies that the document's file blob digest has changed, indicating successful file replacement. The original file is quarterly_report.pdf (6495 bytes) and the document's initial description is 'Standard service agreement template v1.0'.
